answer:
\boxed{C}

The **thyrocervical trunk** gives rise to the **inferior thyroid artery**, which supplies blood to the parathyroid glands. Damage to this vessel during surgery can lead to parathyroid gland ischemia, causing **hypoparathyroidism** (low calcium, low PTH) or **parathyroid hormone deficiency**. The postoperative findings (low calcium, low PTH) strongly suggest parathyroid gland injury.
